blocks.text: I'll process the first sample (Patient 145, Day 0) with scanpy using the standard QC → normalization → HVG → PCA → clustering → UMAP workflow.

blocks.content: {"status": "ok", "name": "scrna-qc-clustering", "body": "scRNA-seq QC+clustering (scanpy): read 10x; calculate_qc_metrics; filter n_genes>=200 & pct_mito<0.20; normalize_total(1e4)+log1p; highly_variable_genes; pca; neighbors; umap; leiden; rank_genes_groups. Plots: HVG plot and PCA variance side-by-side; UMAP colored by leiden; use sc.pl.* not hand-rolled matplotlib."}

blocks.text: Now let me present the plan based on this recipe:

input.title: Process GSE192391 Patient 145 Day 0 with scanpy
input.summary: Standard scRNA-seq QC, normalization, HVG selection, PCA, Leiden clustering, and UMAP visualization on the first sample.
input.rationale: Best-practice single-sample processing to identify cell types and quality issues before any downstream analysis.
input.assumptions:
- Using the first sample only (GSM5746259: Patient 145, Day 0)
  - Standard QC thresholds: n_genes ≥ 200, mt_fraction < 0.20
  - Normalization: CPM (10,000 counts/cell) + log transform
  - Leiden clustering with default resolution
  - Homo sapiens (mitochondrial genes prefixed 'MT-')

steps.title: Load and inspect the first sample
steps.description: Load GSM5746259 (Patient 145 Day 0) from the registered dataset directory and inspect basic metrics

steps.title: Calculate QC metrics and identify doublets/low-quality cells
steps.description: Compute n_genes, n_counts, and mitochondrial percentage per cell

steps.title: Filter low-quality cells
steps.description: Remove cells with n_genes < 200 or mitochondrial fraction > 0.20

steps.title: Normalize and select highly variable genes
steps.description: CPM normalization (10k counts/cell), log transform, then identify HVGs

steps.title: PCA and neighborhood graph
steps.description: Run PCA (50 components), compute k-NN graph for clustering and UMAP

steps.title: Leiden clustering and UMAP
expected_outputs: UMAP plot colored by Leiden cluster

steps.title: Identify cluster markers
steps.description: Differential expression within clusters to label cell types
expected_outputs: Top marker genes per cluster table
